roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION FOR FORMAL BAIL HRNG & OR RELEASE, FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, MTS & BAIL MOTION/CTORD:PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TOCONTINUE IS GRANTED & THE COURT FINDS NO MISCONDUCT ON THE PART OF THE PEOPLE AS ALLEGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE SUBJECT TO A CURFEW FROM 9PM TO 7AM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/SA2:550 TURK ST, SF CA/SAORD4:25 YARDS/SAORD/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:90 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 08-10-20(30TH)/987,2/BAIL: 60000/CONTD:  PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINS /DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X:THE PEOPLE TAKE A 1ST DISMISSAL/MO PC 1385:VIDEO FORMATTING ISSUES/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BAIL: 15000/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED AND STATUS OF M99 20008515/DOP/
